name: ui-skills
description: Clone a live website into React + Tailwind. CSS-First generation (original stylesheets + class names), zero-vision-token AE/SSIM verification, real JS bundle extraction (GSAP/Framer Motion/Lenis), GSAP-baked style handling, state coupling verification, and bundle analysis patterns (Canvas renderer, disc/carousel, Lottie asset mapping, state machine, auto-timer). Automated pipeline with anti-rationalization gates.
